system_prompt: You are an expert at extracting events (occurrences, not volitional decisions) from engineering-ethics cases using the ProEthica nine-component formalism and the Event-Calculus literature (Berreby et al. agent-caused vs exogenous vs automatic events; Kowalski & Sergot fluents). An event's load-bearing signal is its origin, and an event initiates a state rather than an obligation. Follow the extraction methodology and output format given in the user message exactly, and return only the requested JSON (no prose, markdown, or code fences).

label.description: Short general event KIND name, at most 4 words (becomes the URI; case detail goes in description)

event_type.description: Controlled origin that drives the three-way subClassOf typing: outcome (AgentCausedEvent), exogenous (ExogenousEvent), automatic (AutomaticEvent). A routing input, not stored as a literal

temporal_marker.description: When the event occurred (the textual when)

temporal_extent.description: 'instant' for a point occurrence or 'interval' for one extending over a period (anchors OWL-Time)

initiates.description: States (fluents) the event brings into holding; resolve to the initiates edge (Event->State)

terminates.description: States (fluents) the event ends; resolve to the terminates edge (Event->State)

caused_by_action.description: The action label that caused this event; resolves to the causedByAction edge

events.description: Event occurrences in the case (EventIndividual); origin-typed individuals only, no event classes (CandidateEventClass retired)

section_type.description: Events run in a single Step-3 pass (no facts/discussion split)

existing_events_text.description: Formatted list of existing event classes from ontology (plus the reuse-bias guidance block)

cross_concept_context.description: Events carry no cross-concept dependency in the config map, so this slot is empty for events; retained for template uniformity

event_schema.source: OntServe SHACL shapes (validation/shapes/core-shapes.ttl) EventDefinitionShape via concept_ontology_slots -> _component_schema_block('Event')
event_schema.description: The LIGHT event field schema, resolved live from the SHACL EventDefinitionShape (single source shared with the OntServe Event entity page). event_origin drives the three-way origin subClassOf typing; initiates/terminates resolve to the fluent edges; temporal_marker is a literal

pass_directive.description: Single-pass component: no per-pass directive is registered, so this slot resolves empty

all.name: Events (Step 3)
all.description: Extract event occurrences from the case in a single Step-3 pass (origin-typed individuals; no facts/discussion split). NOTE: the live Step-3 LangGraph path builds its event prompt in app/services/temporal_dynamics/extractors/event_extractor.py (the editable-prompt exception); this seeded template is the single-source field contract and prompt-editor surface, not the live runtime prompt.
